description_long: This indoor rower features a robust, elongated frame with a sleek black finish accented by red highlights, giving it a modern and athletic appearance. The central flywheel housing is circular and substantial, with a red ring detail and a visible drive mechanism, suggesting a magnetic or air resistance system. The seat is contoured and mounted on a long, straight rail, allowing for smooth back-and-forth motion, while the footrests are equipped with adjustable straps and textured surfaces for secure placement. The handlebar is ergonomically shaped with textured grips and is connected to the flywheel by a visible cable. A digital performance monitor is mounted at the front, positioned for easy visibility during use, and features a compact display with several buttons. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a wide base for stability and carefully designed interactive components for user comfort and performance tracking.
description: A modern indoor rower with a black and red color scheme, featuring a circular flywheel housing, contoured seat on a long rail, adjustable footrests, ergonomic handlebar, and a digital performance monitor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual footrests with straps, the handlebar, and the performance monitor above the flywheel housing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated seat rail, contoured seat, large circular flywheel housing, and the full length of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the flywheel housing, the seat rail, and the rear stabilizer bar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the flywheel housing, seat rail, and the seat, mirroring the features seen in view 1.
attribute_seat_rail: A long, straight, metallic rail with a matte black finish, featuring a smooth groove for seat movement and capped ends for safety.
attribute_flywheel_housing: A large, circular plastic housing with a black body and red accent ring, featuring a central vent and no visible branding.
attribute_footrests_with_straps: Paired, textured plastic footrests with adjustable black straps and visible buckles for secure foot placement.
attribute_handlebar: A straight, black handlebar with ergonomic, textured rubber grips and visible cable attachment points at each end.
attribute_performance_monitor: A compact, rectangular digital display with several tactile buttons, mounted above the flywheel housing on a short stem.
